name: bandit.hostile_camp_toll_escalation_live
description: Slice 4 staged/live proof: a scout-confirmed remembered basecamp lead with a seven-member ready bandit camp runs through the real 30-minute overmap cadence and must promote to a toll/shakedown-capable pressure party instead of repeating scout-only pressure.
artifact_patterns: camp-map roster living=7 ready_at_home=7 wounded_or_unready=0 active_outside=0 reserve=2 dispatchable=5
toll: scout-confirmed basecamp lead promotes to a shakedown-capable party

steps.label: post_load_toll_escalation_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the seven-member scout-confirmed remembered-lead fixture; this is only startup/load and fixture footing before the cadence wait
steps.failure_rule: If the gameplay screen is not visible after load, later dispatch-cadence artifact and saved-state gates must fail rather than granting feature proof.

steps.label: preflight_saved_scout_confirmed_toll_lead
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world site did not contain the seven-member ready camp plus scout-confirmed remembered basecamp lead contract
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains a seven-member ready camp, no active outside group, a scout-confirmed basecamp lead before live cadence proof starts
steps.failure_rule: If roster or lead footing is missing, later toll escalation logs cannot be credited as Slice 4 live/staged proof.

steps.label: wait_30_minutes_for_toll_escalation_dispatch_cadence
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the duration menu
artifact_state_patterns: camp-map roster living=7 ready_at_home=7 wounded_or_unready=0 active_outside=0 reserve=2 dispatchable=5
steps.expected_visible_fact: the player waited through the real 30-minute overmap NPC cadence window; feature credit depends on same-run debug artifact lines proving toll escalation, not on the wait UI alone
steps.failure_rule: If the wait is interrupted, or the bounded wait choice lacks post-wait toll dispatch artifacts and saved active toll state, this scenario is inconclusive/red; noisy wait-menu OCR may defer to strict cadence artifacts.

steps.label: open_save_quit_prompt_after_toll_escalation
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit prompt is visible after the toll escalation probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit cannot be opened, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as a clean saved-state proof.

steps.label: confirm_save_quit_after_toll_escalation
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit confirmation completed after the toll escalation probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit confirmation is unproven, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as fully green without reviewing cleanup status.

steps.label: audit_saved_toll_escalation_party
steps.abort_reason: saved bandit_live_world did not persist the expected toll escalation outcome: four ready at home and three active toll members
steps.expected_immediate_state: after save/quit, saved bandit_live_world contains the same seven-member camp with an active toll dispatch: three concrete active outside members and four ready at home
steps.failure_rule: If active toll dispatch state or the 4-ready/3-active roster split is missing, same-run log escalation cannot close the staged proof by itself.

steps.label: audit_toll_escalation_artifact
required_line_patterns: camp-map roster living=7 ready_at_home=7 wounded_or_unready=0 active_outside=0 reserve=2 dispatchable=5
toll: scout-confirmed basecamp lead promotes to a shakedown-capable party
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not show seven-member roster inputs, scout-confirmed toll promotion, shakedown-capable local-gate state, no live signal, and saved active toll dispatch
steps.failure_rule: No Slice 4 toll escalation proof credit if the artifact lacks the roster/reserve/dispatchable line, the toll promotion note, and the live local-gate shakedown-capability line from the same run.

evidence_contract.claim: the real live dispatch cadence can promote a scout-confirmed bandit basecamp lead into a toll/shakedown-capable party: a seven-member ready camp preserves a two-member reserve, sends three active toll members, and reaches a shakedown-capable local gate state rather than repeating scout-only pressure
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for hostile-camp toll escalation
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No feature-proof credit if startup/load, saved preflight roster+pressure+lead footing, real wait/cadence action, same-run dispatch/local-gate artifact, save/writeback, and saved active toll roster split are not all green/matched.
